title: hypericum acutum var. rotundifolium
intro: Hypericum acutum var. rotundifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved St. John's Wort, is a plant species within the St. John's Wort family, Hypericaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of hyperforin and hypericin, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, depression, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Hypericum acutum var. rotundifolium include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support mental well-being and skin health.
